name: Green Pepper Aspic
recipeIngredient: 4 large green peppers, seeded and cut into 6ths
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach the food grinder using a fine grinding plate. Turn to speed 4 and grind the peppers. Measure out 1/4 cup of pepper juice. Place the juice and water in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until boiling, then remove from heat and sprinkle gelatin over the mixture. Stir well to dissolve completely.
3. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper; mix well.
4. Refrigerate until partially set.
5. Assemble and attach the rotor slicer/shredder using a fine shredding cone (no 1). Turn to speed 4 and shred carrots. Mix the shredded carrots with the remaining green peppers and mayonnaise.
6. Fold this mixture into the gelatin, then place it in an oiled 4-cup mold. Refrigerate until set. Unmold before serving.
